title: deer-flow.sandbox.risk v1
description: Sandbox audit classification per command. SandboxAuditMiddleware tags every shell command with a risk level and optionally blocks. This event surfaces the full classification stream (including low-risk) so security monitors, DLP systems, and behavior dashboards can subscribe. Source: /deer-flow/middlewares.

risk_level.description: Risk classification from the audit middleware

matched_rule.description: Identifier of the rule that fired (e.g. 'destructive_filesystem', 'permissive_chmod'); null when no rule matched

action.description: Middleware decision: blocked (refused), allowed (permitted, no flag), warned (permitted with flag)

reason.description: Short explanation when action=blocked or warned (truncated 200 chars)
